title: MeowCraft
description:
🔥 WISHLIST NOW!!!

Об игреManage Your Feline ForgeOpen your very own forge in a bustling corner of the Meow Capital. Here, you'll need to roll up your sleeves—and wave your paws—to personally hammer cold metal into top-tier weapons, sturdy armor, and impenetrable shields. Polish them until they sparkle before displaying them on your shelves. The survival (and the wallets) of local adventurers depends entirely on your craftsmanship. As your fame spreads across every street and alley, customers will flock to your door, transforming your humble shop from a tiny corner stall into an economic legend of the Capital!

Forge Legendary GearThrough countless hammer strikes and moments of fur-flying stress, your forging skills will reach absolute purrfection. Whether it’s researching complex blueprints or satisfying the bizarre, bespoke requests of picky adventurers, no order is too tough for you. If ordinary gear isn’t cutting it, try inlaying shiny magic gems recovered from the dungeons to boost their stats. After all, even a cat can’t resist the shiny glow of a legendary weapon!

 

Hire Staff & Expand Your ShopBusiness booming faster than you can swing a hammer? Time to hire some help! Recruit a diverse crew of cats with specialized skills (or those just looking to earn some extra kibble) to optimize your production line. From daily hammering to advanced blueprint research—and even secret feline technologies only cats understand—you can trust your staff to handle the grind. 

As the boss, don’t forget to expand your workshop. Upgrade workstations, set up comfy anvils, and arrange more display shelves so every adventurer can find exactly what they need. 

 

Arm Quirky HeroesAs your shop grows, you’ll meet adventurers of all stripes: starry-eyed rookies full of dreams, grizzled mercenaries working for a living, mysterious mages with immense power, and bard cats who only know how to strum harps and sing for discounts. Despite their quirky personalities, they are all loyal paying customers. Craft custom equipment tailored just for them. After all, you need them to survive the monsters out there so they can come back alive—and spend more money at your shop!

 

Dispatch Epic ExpeditionsThe curse of the Demon Dragon might keep you from wielding a sword, but that doesn’t mean you can’t reap the dungeon's rewards! Organize your best-armed adventurer squads or head to the guild to post bounties, dispatching them into the depths to hunt for rare crafting materials. As your heroes bring back epic loot, you will piece together the dark truth behind the Demon Dragon. Just wait—the day of your revenge is coming, meow!
description_short: Manage your own feline forge in this cozy yet deep shop simulation! Craft epic legendary gear, expand your smithy, hire quirky cat staff, and dispatch hero squads into dangerous dungeons. You may be cursed to never wield a sword again, but you can build a forging empire to defeat the Demon Dragon!
